name: GLP-1(7-36)
source_note: UniProt P01275; native active form 30AA; cAMP EC50~0.08nM (pEC50~10.1, Sebokova 2010); beta-arr pEC50 assay-dependent

name: GIP(1-42)
source_note: UniProt P09683; native 42AA; progenitor N-terminus of tirzepatide; full GIPR agonist

name: Exenatide
source_note: Eng 1992 PMID1617203; exendin-4 synthetic form; 39AA; first approved GLP-1RA (2005); 53% homology to GLP-1; cAMP pEC50 value from literature approximation, not independently verified

name: Lixisenatide
source_note: Fonseca 2012 PMID22190679; exendin-4 + 6xLys C-terminal; 44AA; once daily; EU approved 2013; sequence confirmed via HongTide catalog; cAMP pEC50 value from literature approximation, not independently verified

name: Liraglutide
source_note: Knudsen 2019 PMC6474072; Lys34->Arg; C16 palmitoyl-gammaGlu at Lys26; 31AA backbone; approved 2010; once daily; cAMP pEC50 value from literature approximation, not independently verified

name: Albiglutide
source_note: Bush 2009 PMID19187286; GLP-1(7-37) tandem dimer fused to albumin; Ala8->Gly; low GLP-1R potency; withdrawn 2017; cAMP pEC50 value from literature approximation, not independently verified

name: Taspoglutide
source_note: Sebokova 2010 PMID21114599; Ala8->Aib(X); Gly35->Aib(X); cAMP EC50=0.06nM (pEC50=10.22); beta-arr not reported; Phase3 discontinued 2010 (immunogenicity); X=Aib

name: Dulaglutide
source_note: Glaesner 2010 PMID20030782; Ala8->Aib(X); IgG4-Fc fusion; X=Aib; cAMP pEC50 value from literature approximation, not independently verified

name: Semaglutide
source_note: Knudsen 2019 PMC6474072; Ala8->Aib(X); Lys34->Arg; C18 diacid at Lys26; approved 2017; once weekly; X=Aib; cAMP pEC50 value from literature approximation, not independently verified

name: Tirzepatide
source_note: Willard 2020 JCI Insight PMC7526454; GLP-1R cAMP EC50=101.9nM (pEC50~7.0); beta-arr <10% Emax (undetectable); cAMP-biased at GLP-1R; full agonist at GIPR; X=Aib
